offer: For accounting firm partners processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual billing processes cause time inefficiencies. We generate automated client billing summaries instead of manual billing summary creation.
problem: Manual billing processes lead to time inefficiencies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firm partners
Indie Hackers discussions on billing workflows
DM outreach to accounting firm partners with demo video
Community forums for accounting firm partners sharing tools
try_it: Let users try template-based summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing client data
